label: CIS Safeguard 12.2
title: Establish and Maintain a Secure Network Architecture

prose.en: Design and maintain a secure network architecture. A secure network architecture must address segmentation, least privilege, and availability, at a minimum. Example implementations may include documentation, policy, and design components.
A secure network architecture is designed and maintained.
The secure network architecture addresses segmentation, least privilege, and availability, at a minimum.

example.en: Example implementations may include documentation, policy, and design components.
